reviews.comment:
La verdad estaba tomando un café y cuando escuché que tenían habitaciones quise verlas y me resultó excelente el lugar y el precio. Vale la pena visitarlo. Y la atención de las chicas/os divinos!

(Translated by Google)
I was having a coffee when I heard they had rooms, so I decided to check them out. The place and the price were excellent. It's definitely worth a visit. And the staff were wonderful!
